meaning: n.试用,见习,鉴定,查验,证明,察看,缓刑
examples: The prisoner was put on probation.
He was given two years' probation.
She was found guilty of manslaughter and put on probation for two years.
Last August West Yorkshire Probation Trust admitted failures in their initial risk assessment of Aziz.
U.S. District Judge Kenneth Ryskamp gave Ms. Curran one year probation, then instantly revoked it altogether.
